forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the north, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 22 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers on and east of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Hawker in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers on and east of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Hawker in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloud clearing. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Coober Pedy in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek. Thunderstorms possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the eastern border. Winds southeast to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Leigh Creek in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
